task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer should be open with a 3D molecular structure visible, and '1EHZ' should appear in the right-hand object menu or the command history.

task_completion.description: Color-code the four main structural domains with distinct colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tRNA structure in the PyMOL viewer should be colored in at least four distinct colors corresponding to different regions (Acceptor stem, D-arm, Anticodon arm, T-arm).

task_completion.description: Measure the distance between residue 76 and residue 35.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed measurement line should be visible in the PyMOL viewer spanning from the 3' terminal end (top) to the anticodon loop (bottom), with a distance label showing a value between 67 and 80 Å.
The agent should be seen inspecting the sequence (e.g., using the PyMOL sequence viewer showing non-standard codes) or querying residues in the command line/terminal to find modified nucleotides.

task_completion.description: Save the rendered visualization as a PNG image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL command line should show a 'png' command saving to '~/PyMOL_Data/images/trna_domains.png', or a file manager/terminal should show the newly created image file.

task_completion.description: Write the structural analysis report containing domains, distance, and modified nucleotides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., nano, gedit, VS Code) or terminal output should show the creation of '~/PyMOL_Data/trna_structure_report.txt' containing the names of the 4 domains, the measured distance (~67-80 Å), and at least one modified nucleotide.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used PyMOL to visualize the structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PyMOL GUI open and interacted with, rather than the agent just writing a Python script without ever viewing the structure.

integrity.description: Verify the distance measurement was actually performed in PyMOL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer must display the measurement object (dashed line with distance label) on the structure, proving it wasn't just guessed or calculated externally.

integrity.description: Verify the report content matches the visual evidence.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance value written in the report should match the value shown on the measurement line in the PyMOL viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct straight-line distance between residue 76 and residue 35 in 1EHZ is approximately 67 to 80 Å. Valid modified nucleotides in 1EHZ include PSU, H2U, OMC, OMG, YYG, 5MC, 7MG, 5MU, 1MA, M2G (or their full names like pseudouridine, dihydrouridine, wybutosine, methylguanosine, methylcytidine, methyladenosine, methyluridine, ribothymidine). The 4 required domains are Acceptor stem, D-arm, Anticodon arm, and T-arm.
